message:
fix(agent-drivers): prevent sending while agent is thinking

The busy check in send() only checked for "working" and "tool_calling"
states but not "thinking". This allowed multiple messages to be sent
while an agent was still processing a previous message, which could
cause race conditions and confuse the agent.

Added "thinking" to the busy check and added tests for all busy states.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
